 After the installation of TPV on our fr instance, We encountered this issue :
 ```
  File "/shared/mfs/data/dev/galaxy/server/lib/galaxy/jobs/mapper.py", line 236, in __cache_job_destination
    params, raw_job_destination=raw_job_destination
  File "/shared/mfs/data/dev/galaxy/server/lib/galaxy/jobs/mapper.py", line 223, in __determine_job_destination
    job_destination = self.__handle_dynamic_job_destination(raw_job_destination)
  File "/shared/mfs/data/dev/galaxy/server/lib/galaxy/jobs/mapper.py", line 203, in __handle_dynamic_job_destination
    return self.__handle_rule(expand_function, destination)
  File "/shared/mfs/data/dev/galaxy/server/lib/galaxy/jobs/mapper.py", line 206, in __handle_rule
    job_destination = self.__invoke_expand_function(rule_function, destination)
  File "/shared/mfs/data/dev/galaxy/server/lib/galaxy/jobs/mapper.py", line 123, in __invoke_expand_function
    return expand_function(**actual_args)
  File "/shared/mfs/data/dev/galaxy/.venv/lib/python3.7/site-packages/tpv/rules/gateway.py", line 50, in map_tool_to_destination
    ACTIVE_DESTINATION_MAPPER = setup_destination_mapper(app, tpv_config_files)
  File "/shared/mfs/data/dev/galaxy/.venv/lib/python3.7/site-packages/tpv/rules/gateway.py", line 28, in setup_destination_mapper
    mapper = load_destination_mapper(tpv_config_files)
  File "/shared/mfs/data/dev/galaxy/.venv/lib/python3.7/site-packages/tpv/rules/gateway.py", line 19, in load_destination_mapper
    current_loader = TPVConfigLoader.from_url_or_path(tpv_config_file)
  File "/shared/mfs/data/dev/galaxy/.venv/lib/python3.7/site-packages/tpv/core/loader.py", line 128, in from_url_or_path
    tpv_config = util.load_yaml_from_url_or_path(url_or_path)
  File "/shared/mfs/data/dev/galaxy/.venv/lib/python3.7/site-packages/tpv/core/util.py", line 13, in load_yaml_from_url_or_path
    else:
  File "/shared/mfs/data/dev/galaxy/.venv/lib/python3.7/site-packages/requests/api.py", line 73, in get
    return request("get", url, params=params, **kwargs)
  File "/shared/mfs/data/dev/galaxy/.venv/lib/python3.7/site-packages/requests/api.py", line 59, in request
    return session.request(method=method, url=url, **kwargs)
  File "/shared/mfs/data/dev/galaxy/.venv/lib/python3.7/site-packages/requests/sessions.py", line 573, in request
    prep = self.prepare_request(req)
  File "/shared/mfs/data/dev/galaxy/.venv/lib/python3.7/site-packages/requests/sessions.py", line 496, in prepare_request
    hooks=merge_hooks(request.hooks, self.hooks),
  File "/shared/mfs/data/dev/galaxy/.venv/lib/python3.7/site-packages/requests/models.py", line 368, in prepare
    self.prepare_url(url, params)
  File "/shared/mfs/data/dev/galaxy/.venv/lib/python3.7/site-packages/requests/models.py", line 440, in prepare_url
    f"Invalid URL {url!r}: No scheme supplied. "
requests.exceptions.MissingSchema: Invalid URL '/shared/mfs/data/dev/galaxy/config/total_perspective_vortex/users.yml': No scheme supplied. Perhaps you meant https:///shared/mfs/data/dev/galaxy/config/total_perspective_vortex/users.yml?
```
I was the same error when I ran the dry-run cli commands if I don't add explicitly yaml files

I have not ideas how I could change the situation. Also, inside a venv, I don't know how I could debug to display variables content

Thanks by advance,","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/galaxyproject/total-perspective-vortex/issues/104/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/galaxyproject/total-perspective-vortex/issues/104/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null}}
